writing.title: Writing Task 1: Fill in your personal form
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) introducing yourself. Include your name, age, nationality, occupation, and address.
writing.sampleAnswer: My name is Linh. I am twenty years old. I am Vietnamese. I am a student. My address is 12 Tran Phu Street, Hanoi. My email is linh@email.com.
checklist: Có đủ 5 thông tin: tên, tuổi, quốc tịch, nghề nghiệp, địa chỉ
Viết câu hoàn chỉnh, có dấu câu

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe your family
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing your family. Say who is in your family and what they are not.
writing.sampleAnswer: This is my family. My father is a doctor and my mother is a nurse. I have one sister. We aren't a big family, but we are very happy.
checklist: Giới thiệu được ít nhất 2 thành viên
Có ít nhất 1 câu phủ định với be (isn't/aren't)
